name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: '[Feature] '

---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you evaluated.

## Affected Areas

Check any that apply:

- TrainingPeaks auth or browsing
- PlanMyPeak export
- Intervals.icu export
- Popup UI
- Build or developer workflow
- Documentation

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or API references.
